subject: Re: bin1 refinement
body:
Hi Hamid,

Are you having problems with GPU memory in RELION or in Warp? It was not
clear to me from your post.

In RELION, you can try explicitly telling it to limit GPU memory usage in
relion_refine, for example:
--free_gpu_memory 1000

Memory management works much better when you do that.

Also make sure that you are only performing local searches (not global) at
this point.

Best wishes,

--
Ricardo Diogo Righetto

Em qui., 24 de ago. de 2023 22:17, Hamidreza Rahmani <hamid13r@gmail.com>
escreveu:

> Dear all,
>
> I was wondering if anyone has done a refinement at bin 1 (apix=1.66A) with
> box size of 256?
>
> I have a lot of problems with extraction and some tilt-series just dont
> work (even though they work fine at bin2 or pixel size of 2.5A!!!). After
> breaking into individual tilt-series and going to relion I cannot refine bc
> I run out of GPU memory.  I have access to GPUs  with 48G of memory and
> only using 1 thread per GPU.
>
> Am I doing something wrong? or do I just need even bigger GPUs?
>
> Best,
> Hamid
>
